ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Primary time zone of the country */,
  "area_km2" TEXT /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the country's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being ranked */,
  "overall_rank" INTEGER /* Overall ranking of the country */,
  "score" REAL /* Happiness and well-being score of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the ranking */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the ranking data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for ranking */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the ranking was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_per_capita" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDP data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the GDP data belongs to */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the GDP data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the GDP data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the GDP data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_per_capita_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social support data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the social support data belongs to */,
  "social_support" REAL /* Social support score of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the social support data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the social support data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the social support data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_support_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthy_life_expectancy" (
  "expectancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthy life expectancy data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the healthy life expectancy data belongs to */,
  "healthy_life_expectancy" REAL /* Healthy life expectancy of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the healthy life expectancy data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the healthy life expectancy data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the healthy life expectancy data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expectancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthy_life_expectancy_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "freedom_to_make_life_choices" (
  "freedom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each freedom data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the freedom data belongs to */,
  "freedom_to_make_life_choices" REAL /* Freedom to make life choices score of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the freedom data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the freedom data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the freedom data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("freedom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_freedom_to_make_life_choices_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generosity" (
  "generosity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generosity data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the generosity data belongs to */,
  "generosity" REAL /* Generosity score of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the generosity data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the generosity data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the generosity data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generosity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generosity_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "perceptions_of_corruption" (
  "corruption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corruption data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the corruption data belongs to */,
  "perceptions_of_corruption" REAL /* Perceptions of corruption score of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the corruption data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the corruption data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the corruption data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corruption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_perceptions_of_corruption_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action taken */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the region */,
  "area_km2" TEXT /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the region's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)
